title: COMMUNITY SOCIAL HEALTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS COALITION COMMUNITY SOCIAL HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 2100 social services, nutritional hot meals, health behavior education, essential clothing, laundry and shower vouchers, temporary PO Box, and pet food, and resource navigation, tobacco, overdose, and suicide services. 4590 Florence Highway 101 N Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: People eligible under SNAP food assistance program Hours: Community Social Health Center: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 11am-1pm Hot meal: Monday/Wednesday/Friday noon-1pm Email (541) 997-5057 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-5057 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: NW Lane County (zip codes 97390, 97412, 97430, 97439, 97480, 97490, 97493, and 97498) SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday noon-1pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: North of Florence across the street from Fred Meyers and O'Reilly's auto parts. Enter left-front lower-level entrance of Community Baptist Church. Services: Community Meals General Clothing Provision Laundry Vouchers Pet Food Public Showers/Baths Temporary Mailing Address Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - SOCIAL SERVICE RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HELPING HANDS COALITION
